affected_files.detail: Extend ContentStore.Create's doc comment to explicitly document duplicate-fileID overwrite semantics. No behavioral/logic change to createWithHook.

dependents: engine/rpc/server.go (delegates to engine/catalog primitives per feature.jsonl entry hivemind-grpc-server-handlers)
risk_rationale: Doc-comment-only change to production code; no logic modified in content.go. New tests are additive and exercise existing, already-safe (upsert + atomic rename) behavior. Matches prior verification finding's own risk=low rating.
